_publications._publicationTitle: Burden of adult neurofibromatosis 1: development and validation of a burden assessment tool

_contextSnippet: The BoN score of the low severity group was 17.6 (±11.9), while that of the moderate severity group was 29.3 (±14.4), and that of the high severity group 45.5 (±18.2), the BoN score differences statistically significant.
details: BoN scores varied significantly by disease severity: low severity 17.6 (±11.9), moderate 29.3 (±14.4), high 45.5 (±18.2)
